status: MAINNET canonical external-contract inventory for Robinhood Chain mainnet (4663), consumed by `bun run derive --network=mainnet` -> out/constants.mainnet.json. Derive fails closed if any external value below is null. treasurySafe may remain the explicit zero address until the production Safe is created; Deploy.s.sol then fails closed with TreasurySafeUnset.

provenance.specRef: docs/developers/design-decisions.md / mainnet O-4 external contract inventory
provenance.verification: Mainnet WETH and Uniswap V3 addresses were migrated from the former derive.ts inline set into this operator-editable source of truth.
notes: weth / v3Factory / positionManager / swapRouter02 / quoterV2: Robinhood Chain mainnet external contracts used by the mainnet constant derivation.
treasurySafe: zero address until the production Safe is created. Set this to the real mainnet Safe before mainnet deploy; the deploy script refuses zero treasurySafe.
